_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Coordinate with intelligence planners to ensure collection managers receive information requirements.
reference_document_element_description: Develop and maintain program plans for data and AI initiatives, including scope definition, workstream structure, milestone schedule, resource plan, and risk register.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-T-010 (RC, cosine: 0.497), LS-S-007 (LS, cosine: 0.484).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.2/10 (raw 0.419). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [collection, coordinate, ensure, information, intelligence, managers] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, data, definition, develop, initiatives, maintain] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.866 (P=0.878, R=0.855). P exceeds R by 0.023 — the DCWF element's 11 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 22 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.2%, N:75.3%, C:24.5%). No dominant classification for "Coordinate with intelligence planners to ensure collection managers receive info" vs "Develop and maintain program plans for data and AI initiatives, including scope" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.521 > STS 0.419 (gap +0.102). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [collection, coordinate, ensure, information, intelligence, managers]. WIDAI terms: [ai, data, definition, develop, initiatives, maintain].
